evidence_boundary: local-only; operator-supervised; single repeatability run; fresh run ID; fresh output root; read-only against source evidence; writes only below the output root until reviewed-safe artifacts are imported into the execution packet; no readiness claim; no evidence promotion; no source-artifact mutation

metadata.evidence_boundary: local-only; operator-supervised; no execution; no providers or external systems; no acceptance; no source-artifact mutation; no evidence promotion

non_execution_confirmation: wrapper does not execute proposed commands; it only classifies proposed command text

preflight_summary.evidence_boundary: local-only; operator-supervised; single repeatability run; fresh run ID; fresh output root; read-only against source evidence; wrapper executes no proposed commands; deterministic read-only consistency checker only; no readiness claim; no evidence promotion; no source-artifact mutation

metadata.repeatability_target: Repeat the same existing evidence packet consistency review pattern used by the first supervised use, using a fresh run ID and fresh output root.
metadata.scope_identity: Repeat the same existing evidence packet consistency review pattern used by the first supervised use, using a fresh run ID and fresh output root.

proposed_task_summary.requested_action: Repeat the same existing evidence packet consistency review pattern used by the first supervised use, using deterministic local packet consistency checking only.
